tooltip.corpse_campus.dominance_crouch_c: Crouch and aim at a mob to bind it under your dominance
tooltip.corpse_campus.dominance_open_lis: Cast normally to open the player list and assign a focus target
tooltip.corpse_campus.dominance_death_li: If all dominated mobs die, you die as well
tooltip.corpse_campus.last_stand: Last stand: stay at 1 HP and gain %s s immunity
tooltip.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_r: If active when you die, you revive immediately as an undead husk
tooltip.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_k: While undead, only kills can restore health. Heal per kill: %s
tooltip.corpse_campus.executioner_damage: Each slash deals %s%% of blade damage
tooltip.corpse_campus.executioner_hold_c: Hold to keep releasing slashes; each trigger also spends mana
tooltip.corpse_campus.executioner_crouch: While crouching, slashes continuously form at the aimed point
tooltip.corpse_campus.mania_forces_front: Rushes and attacks targets in front of you, with every hit showing crit impact
tooltip.corpse_campus.toggle_cast: Cast again to turn it off
tooltip.corpse_campus.hold_cast: Hold the cast to keep control
tooltip.corpse_campus.release_throw: Release the cast to launch the target
tooltip.corpse_campus.sonic_mode: Darkens your vision; targets only reveal themselves when they make sound
tooltip.corpse_campus.danger_mode: Continuously senses enemies that lock onto you and warns their direction
tooltip.corpse_campus.elementalist_rando: All creatures inside the domain are repeatedly struck by random tier-1 fire, water, or lightning attacks
message.corpse_campus.elementalist_no_ma: Not enough mana. The elemental domain collapses
message.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_r: You clawed your way back and became undead
message.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_k: You devoured life and restored %s health
message.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_r: Your vitality has been fully restored; necrotic rebirth ends
message.corpse_campus.executioner_need_b: Executioner requires a usable blade in your main hand
message.corpse_campus.mark_placed: A mark has been etched onto the targeted block
screen.corpse_campus.dominance.title: Dominance Target
screen.corpse_campus.dominance.subtitle: Click a player to make every dominated mob focus them
